cards.back: A large, naturally occurring community of plants and animals that occupy a specific habitat
A community of living organisms (plants, animals, and microbes) interacting with each other and their physical environment
The natural environment in which an organism lives, including physical factors such as soil, water, and climate
The global sum of all ecosystems on Earth, encompassing the interactions between living organisms and their environment
The specific role or position of an organism within its ecosystem, including its relationships with other organisms and the environment
